message:
🐛 Fix offline banner flashing and page skeleton behavior (#486)

1. Layout: Show offline banner for any non-connected agent status
   - Previously only showed for 'disconnected', causing banner to
     disappear briefly during 'connecting' state on navigation

2. Workloads page: Add agent offline check for skeleton display
   - Show skeleton when agent is offline and demo mode is OFF
   - Consistent with card behavior

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
